DECLARATION OF CRYSTAL R. DAVIEAU IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FOR ORDER ON STIPULATION (TRANSACTION ID # 78906636) FILED BY DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR ORDER ON STIPULATION IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE COURT NOTES THAT THIS ACTION IS NOT PENDING IN "COUNTY OF RIVERSIDE" AND THAT THE PROOF OF SERVICE CONTAINS A CUMULATIVE AND INCOMPLETE SENTENCE: "(BY PERSONAL DELIVERY, OVERNIGHT MAIL, FACSIMILE TRANSMISSION OR EMAIL) I SERVED THE FOLLOWING PERSONS AND/OR ENTITIES BY PERSONAL DELIVERY, OVERNIGHT MAIL SERVICE, OF (FOR THOSE WHO CONSENTED IN WRITING TO SUCH SERVICE METHOD, BY FACSIMILE TRANSMISSION AND/OR EMAIL AS FOLLOWS:" MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT AN ORDER FOR EXECUTION. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: L. YOUNG; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-26-2026 Continued To Sep-09-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order On Stipulation
Off Calendar Apr-27-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order On Stipulation
is GRANTED. No opposition filed. The Court notes that this action is not pending in "County of Riverside" and that the Proof of Service contains a cumulative and incomplete sentence: "(BY PERSONAL DELIVERY, OVERNIGHT MAIL, FACSIMILE TRANSMISSION OR EMAIL) I served the following persons and/or entities by personal delivery, overnight mail service, of (for those who consented in writing to such service method, by facsimile transmission and/or email as follows:" Moving party to prepare and submit an order for execution.

Prevailing party to prepare order. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: L. Young; Not Reported. (D501)
